task: View the list of the Most Popular TV on rotten tomatoes.
graderReasoning: The agent completed the task by navigating from the Rotten Tomatoes homepage to the 'Popular TV' section and clicking 'View all'. The resulting page was clearly the Rotten Tomatoes Most Popular TV list: title 'Best TV Shows (May 2026) | Rotten Tomatoes' at URL 'https://www.rottentomatoes.com/browse/tv_series_browse/sort:popular', with the sort control showing 'Sort: Most popular' and the list of TV shows visible. This satisfies 'View the list of the Most Popular TV on rotten tomatoes.'

action_history: Opening Rotten Tomatoes: const rtPage1 = await openTab('https://www.rottentomatoes.com/');
Opening the Popular TV list: await page.locator('e1449').click();
